body.title: Glossary canonicalize + add COA, home_db, local_db, swarm-box
body.result: Glossary canonicalized (commit 364b0c77). Picked lab/docs/glossary.md (github-renderable, next to code) as canonical. DSB + TheIgorsProject CSB rewritten as pointer stubs. Added Hierarchy section: clan / Igor / COA / home_db / local_db / swarm-box. Updated stale Paths (word graph now Postgres clan.wg_*). Palace pointer at theigors/glossary. Cert-walk W1 frozen copies left alone.
body.description:
Three live glossaries exist in three formats (CSB at TheIgorsProject/akien/Readings/glossary.csb.txt 2026-03-02; DSB at TheIgors/lab/design_docs_for_igor/glossary.dsb 2026-03-13; MD at TheIgors/lab/docs/glossary.md no date). All stale (newest is 7 weeks old). None defines COA — surfaced today (2026-05-02) when Akien clarified clan/Igor/COA hierarchy during the SQLite-budget design call.

**Affected files:** pick one canonical home (likely TheIgors/lab/docs/glossary.md — closest to code, github-renderable). Kill or alias the others. Add palace pointer at theigors/glossary so memory_get works.

**Design rules:** ship-clean (no aliasing shims unless they buy something concrete); docs-live-in-code (glossary near the code that uses the terms).

**Scope boundary:** IN — pick canonical home (Akien-call), migrate all unique entries into it, kill or replace-with-pointer the other two, add COA + home_db + local_db + swarm-box, add palace pointer node, update Last-updated. OUT — auditing every entry for currency (separate ticket if needed); cert-walk W1 frozen copies stay frozen.

**Test plan:** (1) grep ~/ for 'glossary' returns one canonical file (plus palace pointer + maybe trash); (2) palace memory_get(path='theigors/glossary') returns pointer to the canonical file; (3) COA / home_db / local_db / swarm-box appear in the canonical glossary.
